initValST.description: Initial sucrose concentration in sieve tube [mmol/cm3]. Raised from 0.2 to start closer to C_targ=0.8

leafGrowthZone.description: Leaf growth zone length (Tardieu et al. 2000: 70-80 mm for maize, temperature-invariant)

Vmaxloading.description: Q4: Reduced from 0.05 after other fixes. Start low, increase if leaf export insufficient

CSTimin.description: Minimum sucrose concentration threshold for loading

beta_loading.description: Q5: Strong self-regulation (was 0.6). At C_ST=0.8: loading=20% of Vmax. Carpaneto 2005: ZmSUT1 inherently reversible

Mloading.description: Michaelis-Menten coefficient for loading [mmol Suc cm-3]. Note: molecular Km of ZmSUT1 = 3.7 mM (Carpaneto et al. 2005), but tissue-level apparent Km is higher

C_targ.description: Raised from 0.4 to match measured maize phloem concentration. Ohshima 1990: 900-1400 mM; Yesbergenova-Cuny 2016: 844 mM; Jensen 2013: 40.7% w/w (~1190 mM)

Vmax_S_ST.description: Max sucrose usage in sieve tube

kM_S_ST.description: Michaelis-Menten constant for ST sucrose usage

kHyd_S_ST.description: Q3: Starch hydrolysis (was 0.0 = irreversible trap). Must be >0 for bidirectional starch buffer. Stems remobilize reserves during grain fill. kHyd >= k_S -> sucrose dominates at equilibrium

k_S_ST.description: Q3: Starch synthesis (was 20.0 = absurdly fast, t1/2~50 min). Stem starch is minor, slow-turnover pool. Bihmidine 2013: maize stems store primarily sucrose, not starch

usePsiXyl.description: Couple sieve tube water potential with xylem potential

sameVolume_meso_seg.description: Same volume for mesophyll and segment

sameVolume_meso_st.description: Same volume for sieve tube and mesophyll

Across_st.description: Total sieve tube cross-sectional area per organ subtype

kr_st.description: Q6: Phloem radial conductivity. Leaf=0 (source). Stem=0.015 (transport phloem leakage, Bihmidine 2015). Root=0.05 (terminal sink, CALIBRATION PARAMETER).

kx_st.description: Q1: Stem from Babst (2022) k with reduced bundles (175). Leaf from HP with plate correction (beta=0.5). Roots from HP with beta=0.7. Stem/leaf ratio ~10x (was 83x).

Krm2.description: Q2: Per-organ-type (root, stem, leaf). Proportionally scaled with Krm1

Krm1.description: Q2: Per-organ-type maintenance respiration (WOFOST). Leaf=0.25 (2.5x; protein-rich), stem=0.15, root=0.15. Total respiration: ~9 -> ~18 mmol/d (50-65% of loading)

Rho_s.description: Sucrose density per organ type (root, stem, leaf)

Rmax_st.description: Maximum growth rate per subtype. Leaf: Ben-Haj-Salah & Tardieu 1995. Root: Bloom et al. 2006. Stem: Morrison et al. 2003.

DefaultC.description: Dummy value for soil sucrose concentration

atol.description: Base absolute tolerance (scaled per variable type internally)
